content_body: We had a wonderful time at your cabin! We made some special family memories. We all love Fall Branch Falls - beautiful! We roasted marshmallows, sat in the hot tub, picked apples at Mercier orchards, checked out Enchanted Mountain Trout meats shop - yummy rainbow trout!, hiked the Appalachian Trail around Long Creek Falls - that was an adventure!, and the kids enjoyed playing on the teepee tent and pool. Overall, we had a great time. We will miss this place, but we may be back next year. I think it's starting to become a family tradition. Oh, last night a screech owl woke us up. We didn't see a bear, but we have seen salamanders at the falls (the kids love them), a deer, chipmunks, and of course, hummingbirds. Thank you for sharing your cabin with us. From our family to yours - may God Bless you.
title: Family Memories Made In North Georgia
